data.description: Bottom-left floating button (Google Maps layers icon style) that opens a panel. Panel contains: imagery toggle (terraformed vs real Mars, mutually exclusive), and feature toggles (topography lines, exaggerated topography, map labels — checkboxes). Panel styled per RP-6. Extensible: adding a new layer to the registry should surface it in this panel automatically. Depends on RP-4 (layer registry), RP-6 (design system), RP-7 (imagery layer).
data.title: Layers panel: floating button + layer toggles

data.body:
VISUAL SPEC FROM MOCKUPS (docs/mockups/LAYER PANEL CLICKED.png, SEARCH SELECTED.png):

TRIGGER BUTTON: Bottom-left corner, ~16px margin. Square rounded button (~56px), white/off-white bg, stacked-layers icon (dark). Hover: bg tint, cursor pointer. Icon itself needs hover state.

PANEL (when open): White card appears ABOVE the trigger button (button likely stays visible or is replaced by panel). 
  Size: left ~1/3 of screen width, bottom ~1/3 of screen height. Margin around edges.
  Contains:
    - 'Layers' title (left) + X close button (right)
    - 4+ checkbox rows: checkbox on left, label text on right
    - Checkbox items (from mockup, squiggly = TBD labels): likely: Topography Lines, Exaggerated Topography, Map Labels, [future layers]
    - Hover on each row: full-row hover bg tint, cursor pointer

COEXISTENCE: Both layers panel and search panel can be open simultaneously (shown in SEARCH SELECTED and SEARCH BAR TYPING mockups).

EXTENSIBILITY: When new layers are added to the registry (RP-4), they should auto-appear in this list without UI code changes.

Mockup reference: docs/mockups/LAYER PANEL CLICKED.png
